name: Double Cheese Tart
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Jarlsberg or lite Swiss cheese, cut in chunks
2 medium tomatoes, peeled and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F (232°C).
2. Place the crust in a 9 x 13 inch tart pan with a removable bottom. Press the edge crimped.
3. Line the crust with foil and fill with dried beans. Bake for 9 minutes at 450°F (232°C). Remove foil and weights, then bake for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Reduce temperature to 350°F (175°C).
5. In a blender, combine cheese, ricotta, eggs, egg whites, onion, garlic, and pepper until smooth.
6. Pour the mixture into the baked crust and place on a baking sheet.
7. Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes at 350°F (175°C).
8. Remove tart from the oven and arrange tomato slices around the edge.
9. Continue baking for an additional 30-35 minutes, or until set. Sprinkle with fresh herbs. Let stand for 20 minutes before slicing.
